name: Chocolate 'n Caramel Bars
recipeIngredient: 1 package Pillsbury Plus German Chocolate Cake Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a 13x9-inch pan.
3. In a large bowl, combine the cake mix, margarine, and milk; mix well.
4. Press half of the dough evenly into the bottom of the greased pan.
5. Sprinkle chocolate chips and nuts evenly over the dough.
6. Drizzle caramel ice cream topping evenly over the dough.
7. Crumble remaining dough mixture over the ice cream topping.
8. Bake at 350°F for 25-30 minutes, or until the caramel begins to bubble.
9. Allow bars to cool completely before cutting into pieces. Makes 36 bars.
